reference: Ka ba naŋ pãã ko yɛ, bonso, ka yɛ duoro yɛmenne aŋa o da ba waa kyɔɔtaa?
hypothesis: Kaba nampan koyɛ, bonso, ka yɔ duoro yɛ mɛnɛ anga odaba wa cɔɔta.

reference: Ma yɛ male ka yɛ taa la bonzaa yɛ naŋ boɔrɔ wɛ!
hypothesis: Mɛɛbɛɛ malle ka ya taa la, bɔnzaa, yɛna mbuora dɔgɔ.

reference: Yɛ male ka yɛ leɛ la bondaanema meŋ wɛ!
hypothesis: yamma la kyɛɛli yela bondana ma min

reference: Ma yɛ leɛ la namine kyɛ ka te ba soŋ yɛ wɛ!
hypothesis: Maaliɛla namini. Sɛka te ba song ya.

reference: Serɛzaa, N da na boɔrɔ la ka yɛ waa namine ka te zaa laŋ dire naaloŋ!
hypothesis: Sa zaa, n da na boore la ka ya wa na mine, ka ti zaa langdiri na long.

reference: Bonso, N teɛre ka Naaŋmen eɛɛ la ka tenee apostoliimine leɛ a noba zaa parebaaraa, a waa ŋa noba ba naŋ di ba sɛrɛɛ a yeli ka ba seŋ ne la kũũ, bonso, te waa la noba, a andonɛɛ, a malekere ane nensaalba naŋ kaara.
hypothesis: Bonso. Enteekan namni yela ka teni aposoli mine li and ba za parbaara. A wa nganu wa banandi ba sere. Ayele ka ba sini leku. Bonso. Ti wala nganu a anduni ammalikiri ani nin salba na nkara.

reference: Te waa la dambolo a Kirista zuiŋ, kyɛ yɛ waa la yɛndeme a Kirista eŋɛ.
hypothesis: Tu wala dem bulu a Krista zĩ, kye ya wala yẽndeme a Krista ĩ.

reference: Te waa la bambaalba kyɛ ka yɛ waa gandaare, a taa yuori kyɛ ka te dire vi.
hypothesis: Du ala ba m baal ba. Cɛ ka ya wa gaa ndaare. Ata yiri cɛ ka ti dire vi.

reference: A naŋ wa tɔ pampana, te taa la kɔŋ ane kɔŋnyuuri, a su bonzagra ka ba ŋmɛ te, ka te ba taa zie na kpɛ, a kyɛ toŋ toma bale ane temenne nuuri.
hypothesis: A na wa topa m pana, ti ta la kong a ni ko nyure. A subu zagra kabang weti, ka ti ba ta zia na pe, a ce tuntuma bale a ni ti mi nyure.

reference: Ka ba naŋ wa to te, te maŋ maale ba la; ka ba naŋ wa dɔgre te, te maŋ di la kannyiri; ka ba naŋ wa sãã te yuori, te maŋ yeli sɔge ne la nimimaaroŋ.
hypothesis: Kɔbana n wato te temane maala bala. Kɔbana n wodɔɔri te mandilɛɛ kɛnyiri. Kɔbana n wa saati yuuri te man yili sɔg n ni la ni mi maaro.

reference: A wa tɔ ŋaa, te waa ŋa a andonɛɛ sagre, a noba zaa tampuori.
hypothesis: A wa toŋa tu waŋa anduna sagere. A nuba zaa taŋ puori.

reference: Saa Wuluu.
N ba sɛgrɛ a ŋaa ka N eŋ yɛ vi, kyɛ N boɔrɔ la ka N kpãã yɛ aŋa n poyɛŋ biiri.
hypothesis: Mba saagre a nga ka e yevii, kye a mborla ka e pwaye a nga empo ye mbiiri.

reference: Ka yɛnee gba taa wulwulibo turi pie a Kirista eŋɛ, kyɛ yɛ ba taa saamine yaga.
hypothesis: Ka neng banta wuli bulbo tru pie a Kristo enenge. Che bata sa min ya.

reference: Serɛzaa, a Kirista Yeezu eŋɛ, N waa la yɛ saa a Ŋmen-yelnoore N naŋ taa wa ko yɛ zuiŋ.
hypothesis: tere a a Krista Yesu eŋa enwɔlɔ a yesa a gonyi a nɔɔre naŋ taa waku Yesu yi.

reference: N pãã sɔrɔ yɛ la, yɛ tɔglɔ n eebo.
hypothesis: paalo, sɔre la, ye toro la e e.

reference: A yeli ŋa zuiŋ la ka n tonɔ Timoti naŋ waa n poyɛŋ neɛ kyɛ e bie naŋ taa yelmeŋɛ a Daana eŋɛ, ka o wa teɛre yɛ a n sobie a Kirista Yeezu eŋɛ, a seŋ N naŋ kanna a puoruu laŋne poɔ a ziiri zaa lɛ.
hypothesis: a yeli nga zui la ka en tinoto moti na wa en puo yen ni e. Che i bie nan taa yeli mine adana en e, ka o wa ti yere a en sobie a Kristo Yesu en e, a sin en nan kan na a puo ru lang ni puo a ziiri zaa la.

reference: Kyɛ yɛ mine naŋ teɛrɛ ka N koŋ la leɛ wa yɛ zie zuiŋ, yɛ piili wullo la yɛmenne.
hypothesis: jɛɛmɛ na n tiɛrɛ ka, ɛn kɔn lalliri wayɛ, Ziɛ suiri, yɛ pii wulo la ya mɛn.

reference: Kyɛ ka a Daana wa sage, a koŋ la kɔɔre kyɛ ka N wa yɛ zie.
hypothesis: ceka dã na wa saga, a ko la ko re ceka ĩ wa ye zi.

reference: N ba waana ka N kyɛlle a pɔloo deme ŋa yelyelii, N waana la ka N nyɛ a ba kpeɛ̃õ.
hypothesis: m ba waana ka en chele apolo demenga yelyeli en wanala ka en ye abagpiyeng

reference: Bonso, a Naaŋmen naaloŋ ba be yɛlɛ yeluu poɔ, kyɛ o be la kpeɛ̃õ zie.
hypothesis: Bonsoir. A na mun nalun babbe yele yele puor. Cɛ obela piɛozi.

reference: Boŋ la ka yɛ na boɔrɔ?
hypothesis: Bon la ka ya buo.

reference: N wa yɛ zie ne kpaaraa bee N wa ne nɔmmo ane sumaaroŋ?
hypothesis: A wɛ yɛ zii ne paara bɛ, iŋ wa ne nɔmu, ani sumarao.

reference: 1 KOR 14.
hypothesis: Goro ne.

reference: A Vooroŋ Soŋ Kyɔɔtaare Yɛlɛ.
hypothesis: dendan dan surupie an

reference: Yɛ eŋ faŋ boɔrɔ nɔmmo kyɛ moɔ nimiri boɔrɔ a Vooroŋ Soŋ kyɔɔtaare, a gaŋ a zaa, ka ka yɛ na maŋ toɔ̃ yele Ŋmen-yelmanna yelyelii.
hypothesis: Yɛ ŋa faa buɔra na nɔmɔ. Kyɛ moɔ ne mi buɔra a vorɔnsɔ nchɔ tare a gaŋa zaa. Ka ka e na maŋ tuɔ yɛle mine yɛlɛ maana yɛlɛ yɛlɛ.

reference: Bonso, banaŋ naŋ yele kɔkɔsaama ba yele korɔ nensaalba, kyɛ Naaŋmen la ka ba yele korɔ.
hypothesis: Bonso, ba na naŋ yele ko kɔsã ma, ba yele koro ne salba, kyɛ naŋ min la ka ba yele koro.

reference: Neɛzaa ba maŋ baŋ bonna ba naŋ yele tɛgɛ, bonso, ba maŋ yele la yelsɔglɔ a Vooroŋ Soŋ eŋɛ.
hypothesis: N yɛɛ saba maamba bɔn na bana yele tɛgɛ bonsɔɔ. Bama yele la yɛlɛ sɔrlɔ a vɔɔrɔn sɔn

reference: Kyɛ soba na naŋ yele Ŋmen-yelmanna yelyelii, yele korɔ la noba, ka ba yeldeebo na baara, a yeli teɛ ba kyɛ moore ko ba.
hypothesis: Dagaa ba na n yele, mine yele mana n yel yele, yele kora la noba. Kaba yel dibo na baara, a yel tiaba, cha moore kora.

reference: Banaŋ naŋ yele kɔkɔsaama, soŋnɔ la bamenne yoŋ, kyɛ banaŋ naŋ yele Ŋmen-yelmanna yelyelii, soŋnɔ la a puoruu laŋne noba.
hypothesis: Bana nanye le kooko saama, so na la ba mini yon. Te bana nanye le nwen yel man na yel yeli, so na la puru lanne no ba.

reference: N na boɔrɔ la ka yɛ zaa yele kɔkɔsaama, kyɛ a gaŋ a zaa N na boɔrɔ la ka yɛ yele Ŋmen-yelmanna yelyelii.
hypothesis: en na buorola ka e zaa yele ko ko saama. Te aganaza en na buorola ka yele ni alimana yele.

reference: A soba na naŋ yele Ŋmen-yelmanna yelyelii gaŋ la soba na naŋ yele kɔkɔsaama kyɛ ka neɛzaa ba kyebe na iri a kɔkɔsaama tɛgɛ ka a na toɔ̃ soŋ a puoruu laŋne ka o baara.
hypothesis: Asuuna neng yiri mni n yel mana yel yili. Gang lasuuna neng yili ko ko saama. Seka ni e zaa be cebe na iri a kokosamma tege. Ka na tuɔ sung apuoro langni ka u baara.

reference: Azuiŋ, n yɔɔmine ane n yɔɔpuuli, ka maa wa yɛ zie a yele kɔkɔsaama kyɛ ba yele yɛlɛ Naaŋmen naŋ iri wuli ma, bee yelbammo yɛlɛ, bee a yele Ŋmen-yelmanna yelyelii, bee a wullo yɛ, wola ka N na e soŋ yɛ?
hypothesis: A zui, yel mine ana yel puli kama woyezie ayele ko ko sama, chebe yele yele na na irul ma, bi yele bammo yele, bi ayel mun yel man na yel yeli, bi awulo ya, o la kan na isu yel.

reference: A lɛ ne o zu la ka a waa bon-ŋmeɛre naŋ ba voorɔ zie, ka ba ŋmeɛrɛ ka a kono, aŋa wulee bee pɛnnaa.
hypothesis: A nnoo suulaa ka wa bu mmuyere na ba fuuroo zie, ka ba mmuyere ka koono ang wuu le bii penaa.

reference: Ka ba naŋ ŋmeɛrɛ ka kanzaa ba kono o konni, wola ka neɛ na e baŋ bonna ba naŋ peɛlɛ bee a ŋmeɛrɛ?
hypothesis: Kaba na amuye rekaka kaza bokono koni. Wolaka niyena e bambona bana pyele be amuye rekaka.

reference: Ka a eele ba wa koŋ lɛ a naŋ seŋ ka o koŋ, aŋ la na nare ka o yi zɔɔre?
hypothesis: Kai ilinba wo kun le anansin ka u kun, angla nanare ka u yi zore.

reference: Lɛ meŋ la ka a waa yɛ zie, ka yɛnee yele kɔkɔsaama ka a ba e weliweli, wola ka neɛ na e baŋ bonna yɛ naŋ yele?
hypothesis: Lɛbɛlɛ kãa wa yɛ zii. Ka yɛnɛ yɛrɛ kɔkɔ saama, ka a ba ɛ wɛɛlɛ wɛɛlɛ. Wula ka nɛna ɛ bang, bona yɛnɛ yɛlɛ.

reference: Yɛ na deɛ yele la yɛlɛ bara saseɛ poɔ.
hypothesis: I na dire yie la yie la. Ba ra sa siɛ puɔ.

reference: Yelmeŋɛ zaa, kɔkɔtɛɛtɛɛ be la a teŋɛzu, kyɛ kanzaa ba kyebe ka a o yelbie ba taa tɛgɛ.
hypothesis: Yelmeŋa zaa kokotee bile a tiŋɛ su. Cɛkanɛ zaa be cɛɛbɛ ka o yeli bie bɛɛ taa tegee.

reference: Ka maa pãã ba baŋ a kɔkɔre yelbie tɛgɛ, N na waa la saana a soba na naŋ yele a yɛlɛ zie, ka o meŋ waa saana n zie.
hypothesis: Ka man paam ba bang akoriyel bietega na wa la saana asaman anan yele ayele zie. Ka o men wa saana n zie.

reference: Lɛ meŋ la ka a waa yɛ zie, yɛ naŋ kyerɛ ka yɛ nyɛ a Vooroŋ Soŋ kyɔɔtaare, yɛ moɔ nimiri ka yɛ de a tonɔ ne ka a puoruu laŋne na baara duoro.
hypothesis: Lamine la ka a wa yezie. Yena n kyere ka yɛ nyɛ avoro nsuno cɔotare. Yɛ mo n nimiri ka yɛ de a tu nɔnni ka a puoro laŋni na bare duoro.

reference: Azuiŋ, neɛ naŋ yele kɔkɔsaama seŋ ka o puori sɔre kpeɛ̃õ naŋ na e ka o maŋ toɔ̃ iri a tɛgɛ.
hypothesis: a zuu nienna yele koku sammasinka o puoro sɔrpiɔ na na a ka o maantuori ire ate

reference: Ka maa puoro yele kɔkɔsaama, n seɛ maŋ puoro la kyɛ n yɛŋ ba erɛ bonzaa.
hypothesis: ka maampuro yelekoco saama. Ensi e maampuro la ce en yang ba irebonza.
